name: io.github.Kali123411/kx402
description: Kaspa x402 agent payer — pay x402 v2 services on Kaspa (KAS) per call, no account or API key

environmentVariables.name: KASPA_X402_KASPA_WASM_MODULE
environmentVariables.description: Path to the rusty-kaspa v2.0.0 nodejs WASM SDK (kaspa.js). Get it with the repo's `npm run fetch-sdk`.

environmentVariables.name: KASPA_X402_FUNDING_WALLET
environmentVariables.description: Funding key: wallet-key:<path> to a 0600 file holding a 64-hex private key, or a raw 64-hex key.
